    univ.calculate_distances(a='4 5', read_data=True, save_data=True)
    print(f"Data columns after calculation: {list(univ._data.columns)}")
    
    # Create a new universe and test auto-read
    print("\n--- Creating new universe (should auto-read) ---")
    univ2 = ca.Universe('tests/test-data/spc2.gro',

    univ2.calculate_distances(a='4 5', read_data=True, save_data=True)
    print(f"Data columns after (should be same, no recalc): {list(univ2._data.columns)}")
    
    # Test explicit disabling of auto-read/save
    print("\n--- Testing disabled auto-read/save ---")
    univ3 = ca.Universe('tests/test-data/spc2.gro',

    print(f"Data columns after forced calculation: {list(univ3._data.columns)}")
    
    # Clean up
    traj_filename = 'tests/test-data/t-spc2-traj'
